The attack mechanism involves fine-tuning pre-trained models to specific tasks, which can be done efficiently and scalably using alternative strategies such as prompt tuning, LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation), and QLoRA (Quantized LoRA). These methods reduce the computational burden and environmental impact of traditional fine-tuning approaches.
